name: itsmrmetaverse-claude
description: Premium futurist brand site — Tron: Legacy neon cityscape, built by Claude Code

scripts.build:css: mkdir -p dist/css && cp src/css/tokens.css dist/css/tokens.css && cp src/css/layout.css dist/css/layout.css && cp src/css/components.css dist/css/components.css
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist/fonts dist/assets; cp -r src/fonts/* dist/fonts/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r src/assets/* dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:html && npm run build:assets
